scripts.context:build: pnpm -C packages/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js build
scripts.context:sync: pnpm -C packages/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js sync
scripts.context:check: pnpm -C packages/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js check
scripts.da:eval: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js eval --check
scripts.da:report: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js eval
scripts.da:task:template: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js task template
scripts.da:plan:template: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js plan template
scripts.da:step: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js plan eval --check
scripts.benchmark:ctxblock: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js benchmark ctxblock
scripts.benchmark:report: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js benchmark report
scripts.benchmark:mock: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js benchmark run --suite ./bench/suites/agentctx-core-validation.md
scripts.benchmark:metrics: pnpm -C packages/dual-agent-runner build && node packages/dual-agent-runner/dist/cli.js benchmark run --suite ./bench/suites/real-world-validation.md
